Patch Set 4: Code-Review-1

(2 comments)

one more change is missed
diff --git a/config/lustre-build.m4 b/config/lustre-build.m4
index d03d308..73e7f56 100644
--- a/config/lustre-build.m4
+++ b/config/lustre-build.m4
@@ -544,6 +544,7 @@ for arg; do
                --enable-iokit | --disable-iokit ) ;;
                --enable-manpages | --disable-manpages ) ;;
                --enable-ldap | --disable-ldap ) ;;
+               --enable-mpi | --disable-mpi ) ;;
                * ) CONFIGURE_ARGS="$CONFIGURE_ARGS '$arg'" ;;
        esac
 done
@@ -602,6 +603,9 @@ fi
 if test x$enable_ldap != xyes ; then
        RPMBINARGS="$RPMBINARGS --without ldap"
 fi
+if test x$enable_mpi != xyes ; then
+       RPMBINARGS="$RPMBINARGS --without mpi"
+fi

 RPMBUILD_BINARY_ARGS=$RPMBINARGS

Patch Set 5:

Build fails on sles12sp4 x86_64 because it lacks openmpi2-devel:
   error: Failed build dependencies:
   	openmpi2-devel is needed by lustre-client-2.13.50_26_g22d05e5-1.x86_64

I have opened Jira ticket ATM-1636 to ask for this package to be installed.

commit.subject: LU-12214 build: fix build with MPI
commit.message:
LU-12214 build: fix build with MPI

 lack of MPI library dependence will lost a mpi tests
 from build

Cray-bug-id: LUS-6033, LUS-7204
Test-parameters: trivial
